Bash(docker exec docker-local-env-db-1 mysql -u12go -ptest123 12go -e "SELECT tpp.trip_key, tpp.godate, tp.from_id, tp.to_id, s1.station_name as from_name, s2.station_name as to_name FROM trip_pool4_price tpp JOIN trip_pool4 tp ON tp.trip_key = tpp.trip_key JOIN station s1 ON s1.station_id = tp.from_id JOIN station s2 ON s2.station_id = tp.to_id WHERE tpp.godate >= CURDATE\(\) ORDER BY tpp.godate ASC LIMIT 10;")
